title: Heart "Alone" performed by The Classic Rock Show

sentences.en: And the night goes by so very slow. Oh, I hope that it won't end, though, alone.
sentences.ko: 밤이 너무 천천히 지나가. 이대로 혼자 끝나지 않길 바라.

sentences.en: Too bad, I always got by on my own. I never really cared until I met you.
sentences.ko: 안됐지만 난 항상 혼자 지냈어. 널 만나기 전까지는 신경 쓴 적 없었어.

sentences.en: And now it chills me to the bone. How do I get your love? How do I get your love?
sentences.ko: 이제 뼛속까지 차가워져. 어떻게 네 사랑을 얻을 수 있을까?

sentences.en: You don't know how long I ever wanted to touch your lips and hold you tight, oh.
sentences.ko: 네 입술에 닿고 꼭 안고 싶었던 게 얼마나 오래됐는지 넌 몰라.
